basic_details.job_title: DBEO Chitrakoot Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 45 Peon, TGT and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Basic Education Office, Chitrakoot (DBEO Chitrakoot)

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age as on 01 April 2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Trained Post Graduate for PGTs, Graduate with training for Full Time Teacher, B.Com with computer knowledge for Accountant, 8th Pass for Peon/Chowkidar/Assistant Cook
qualification.details: Principal: Trained MA (Hindi/English) or MSc in relevant subjects with 4 years teaching experience in classes 9-12 or equivalent. PGT Hindi: MA Hindi with BA/Sanskrit or Shastri from Sampurnanand Sanskrit University. PGT English: Post Graduate Degree in English with LT Diploma or B.Ed preference. PGT Math: MA/MSc Math or BA/BSc (Hons) with 3-year Math course. PGT Biology: MSc Botany/Zoology or equivalent Life Sciences with training. PGT Chemistry: MSc Chemistry or BSc (Hons) with 3-year course or Biochemistry. PGT Physics: MSc Physics or equivalent with training diploma. Computer Teacher: BCA/MCA or equivalent with DOEACC 'O' level or PGDCA. Care Taker: Graduate with computer knowledge and experience. Accountant: B.Com with computer knowledge DOEACC 'O' level preferred. Lab Assistant: Intermediate with Science. Peon: 8th Pass. Chowkidar: 8th Pass. Full Time Teacher English: Trained Graduate in English with TET for upper primary. Accountant (Class 6-8): B.Com with MS Office and DOEACC 'O' level preferred. Assistant Cook: 8th Pass, physically fit no infectious disease.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DBEO Chitrakoot Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://chitrakoot.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DBEO Chitrakoot Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DBEO Chitrakoot recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DBEO Chitrakoot Various Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 45 vacancies for various Teaching and Non-Teaching posts released by the District Basic Education Office, Chitrakoot.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 25 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years for all the posts.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for the Principal post?
faq.answer: For the Principal post, candidates need to have a Trained MA (Hindi/English) or MSc in relevant subjects with 4 years of teaching experience in classes 9-12 or equivalent.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 6755 to Rs. 30000 per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Merit List, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Which educational qualification is required for the Peon and Chowkidar posts?
faq.answer: For the Peon and Chowkidar posts, candidates must have passed the 8th standard.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DBEO Chitrakoot, which is https://chitrakoot.nic.in. The direct link is also provided in the Important Links section.
